info.title: AI Job Board API
info.description: API for the AI Job Board application — browse job titles, search jobs, and submit applications.

skills.description: Technical, professional, and domain skills found in the resume

recommended_job_titles.description: Job titles that best match the candidate's experience and skills

get.summary: GET /api/admin/courses — list all courses (with optional role filter & pagination)

post.summary: POST /api/admin/courses — create a new course + optionally link to roles

get.summary: GET /api/admin/roles — list all roles (from roles table + distinct role_courses)

post.summary: POST /api/profile — create or update user profile from CV data

post.description: Execute system operations: ingest (seed jobs), matching (match users to jobs), digest (send digest notifications), rescore (re-score all CVs with AI), cleanup (delete old applications), export (download full DB as JSON).
Returns 409 if an admin with this email already exists. Password is hashed before storage.

put.description: Email and/or password can be updated. Returns 400 if nothing to update, 409 if email already taken.

get.description: Returns paginated audit log entries with optional ?action filter. Tracks admin actions like user bans, job CRUD, matching runs, etc.

get.summary: Get a single CV score by ID

get.description: Returns paginated email log entries with optional ?type and ?status filters. Tracks welcome, verification, application, and score emails.
Supports page and limit query params for pagination.

post.description: Creates a job listing with automatic expires_at calculation from expires_in_days.

delete.description: Deletes a job listing by id query parameter.

post.description: Location name must be unique. Returns 409 if already exists.
Title name must be unique. Returns 409 if the title already exists.

get.description: Returns paginated user profiles with optional ?status and ?email filters.

patch.description: Send { action: "ban" } or { action: "unban" } to update the user's status. Logs the action to the audit log.

get.description: Returns total, active, and banned user counts.

post.description: Authenticates with email and password. Creates a signed session cookie on success. If no admins exist yet, bootstraps the first admin from environment variables.
Accepts multipart/form-data with name, email, position, type, salary, and resume file. Uploads the resume to Supabase Storage and stores the application.

get.summary: List job listings with pagination and filters
get.description: Supports search, location, type, page, and limit query params. Returns paginated results.
Returns all job listings, optionally filtered by a title keyword (case-insensitive partial match).
Returns the authenticated user's notifications ordered by most recent first. Supports ?limit=N and ?unread=true query params.

patch.description: Mark a single notification as read (send { id }) or all unread notifications (send { mark_all: true }).
